mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clazz
name = #{name},
room = #{room},
begin_date = #{beginDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
master_id = #{masterId},
subject = #{subject},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, e.name AS master_name, c.create_time, c.update_time, case when NOW() > c.begin_date and c.end_date > NOW() THEN '在读' when c.begin_date > NOW() THEN '未开始' else '已结束' end AS status
FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.end_date BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end}
SELECT id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time from clazz where id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time from clazz
